headline: Camp Dream GA helps families and groups find meaningful camp experiences without the usual planning chaos
subheadline: Discover premium Georgia camp programs, seasonal family adventures, and retreat planning support through a clean, trustworthy site built for bookings, inquiries, and long-term search growth.

heroPanel.heading: One polished site for inspiration, trust, and conversion.
heroPanel.body: The public experience now balances premium design with practical buying paths: direct checkout for simple packages, inquiry-first for planning support, and custom qualification for larger group retreats.

points.label: Season Pass
points.value: Best for families who want a simple, direct path into upcoming camp experiences.

points.label: Family Adventure Weekend
points.value: Best for households that want a guided package and planning support.

points.label: Group Retreat Planning
points.value: Best for schools, churches, and organizations that need custom coordination.

workflowHeadline: From first visit to confident booking, every step is designed to feel intentional and easy to trust.

workflowSteps.title: Browse the right program
workflowSteps.description: Visitors can quickly understand whether they need a direct booking, a guided family package, or a custom retreat conversation.

workflowSteps.title: Learn through helpful content
workflowSteps.description: Original planning articles answer real questions and support organic search without feeling thin or ad-stuffed.

workflowSteps.title: Choose the next step
workflowSteps.description: Use checkout when the fit is clear, or send a detailed inquiry when the experience needs more planning.

buyerPathsIntro: Each path is designed around a real parent, organizer, or group leader decision.

buyerPaths.title: Reserve a Season Pass
buyerPaths.description: A direct-buy option for visitors who already know they want a premium Georgia camp experience this season.
buyerPaths.outcome: Fastest route from interest to revenue.

buyerPaths.title: Start a Family Adventure Weekend
buyerPaths.description: A higher-touch option for families who want curation, planning help, and a memorable shared experience.
buyerPaths.outcome: Best route for premium service revenue and stronger satisfaction.

buyerPaths.title: Scope a Group Retreat
buyerPaths.description: A qualification-first lane for schools, churches, teams, and community organizations with more moving parts.
buyerPaths.outcome: Best route for larger, custom engagements.

audienceIntro: The site is shaped around the audiences most likely to need clarity, confidence, and premium support.

audiences.title: Parents and families
audiences.description: Use Camp Dream GA to compare experiences, understand what to expect, and move from research to booking with less friction.

audiences.title: Group organizers
audiences.description: Build a retreat or shared experience without juggling scattered notes, broken forms, and unclear next steps.

audiences.title: Search-driven visitors
audiences.description: Find genuinely useful resource content that answers questions before you ever commit to a program.

proofHeadline: Trust comes from clarity, useful content, and a public experience that feels complete.
whyNowHeadline: Why the rebuilt experience converts better

whyNowCards.title: The navigation and content architecture are cleaner
whyNowCards.description: Visitors can now tell the difference between browsing, booking, and inquiry-first paths immediately.
whyNowCards.outcome: Less confusion and stronger conversion intent.

whyNowCards.title: Legal pages, policies, and resource depth are now part of the site foundation
whyNowCards.description: This supports both user confidence and AdSense/publisher readiness.

whyNowCards.title: Programs and content now support each other
whyNowCards.description: Program pages drive bookings while resource pages support search growth and future ad inventory.

founderStory.heading: Camp Dream GA is designed to work as both a premium brand site and a scalable content property.
founderStory.body: The site now supports direct monetization through bookings and planning packages while also creating room for compliant content monetization on long-form resource pages.

productsIntro: Programs are presented as clear, premium options instead of generic, cluttered listings.
objectionHeadline: Questions visitors often need answered before they commit

objections.question: Is this only for one kind of camper?
objections.answer: No. The site now supports direct family bookings, guided planning, and larger group retreat coordination.

objections.question: Can I still talk to a person before buying?
objections.answer: Yes. Guided family packages and custom retreats both use an inquiry-first path so you can scope the right fit.

objections.question: Will the resource section feel overloaded with ads?
objections.answer: No. Ads are reserved for compliant content templates only and are intentionally kept away from sensitive flows and premium CTAs.

faq.question: Can I book directly online?
faq.answer: Yes. Select offers can use a direct checkout path, while more complex experiences use inquiry-first planning.

faq.question: Do you help with custom group retreats?
faq.answer: Yes. Group Retreat Planning is designed for schools, churches, teams, and community organizations that need a custom path.

faq.question: Why does the site include resource articles?
faq.answer: Because strong planning content helps families make better decisions, supports SEO, and creates a compliant foundation for content monetization.

finalCta.heading: Browse programs if you are ready to choose, or contact the team if you want help planning the right experience.
finalCta.body: Every route is now built to reduce friction while keeping the premium feel of the brand intact.
